title: Senior Fleet Manager at Mahindra Navistar

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Mahindra Navistar
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Mahindra Navistar! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Kanpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Mahindra Navistar:
Mahindra Navistar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Navistar!
